channel.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin
channel.description: A daily good-news bulletin covering recreational fishing, the outdoors and the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out.
channel.itunes:author: Glenn Watt
channel.itunes:subtitle: Fishing, outdoors and Northern Territory news
channel.itunes:summary: A daily good-news bulletin covering recreational fishing, the outdoors and the Northern Territory, Australia and further afield, with the doom-and-gloom left out.

item.title: Barefoot Daily News Bulletin — Monday 13 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: NSW clubs invited to apply for Gone Fishing Weekend support packages (Fishing World); New artificial reef installed off Coffs Harbour to boost fish stocks (Fishing World)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • NSW clubs invited to apply for Gone Fishing Weekend support packages — Fishing World
  • New artificial reef installed off Coffs Harbour to boost fish stocks — Fishing World

item.title: A new reef down south and a barra tug-of-war
item.description: In this edition: New artificial reef sunk off Coffs to fire up the fishing (Fishing World); Barra on the fly: a proper tug-of-war worth a re-watch (Flylords Mag)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • New artificial reef sunk off Coffs to fire up the fishing — Fishing World
  • Barra on the fly: a proper tug-of-war worth a re-watch — Flylords Mag

item.title: Snapper smiles and a saltwater double haul
item.description: In this edition: 154 boats, good vibes and a big red: the Trophy Hunter Snapper Bash (Fishing World); Sharpen your saltwater double haul: a quick video refresher (Gink & Gasoline)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • 154 boats, good vibes and a big red: the Trophy Hunter Snapper Bash — Fishing World
  • Sharpen your saltwater double haul: a quick video refresher — Gink & Gasoline

item.title: The Territory Wrap — Tuesday 7 July 2026
item.description: In this edition: Christmas Island still delivering the goods on the flats (Big Y Fly Co); Aussie-made lures and flies star at this month's Expo (Fishing World); Victoria's next 10-million-fish stocking season kicks off (Victorian Fisheries Authority); Queensland opens up more dams for stocked fishing (Fishing Charters Australia)
item.content:encoded:
In this edition:

  • Christmas Island still delivering the goods on the flats — Big Y Fly Co
  • Aussie-made lures and flies star at this month's Expo — Fishing World
  • Victoria's next 10-million-fish stocking season kicks off — Victorian Fisheries Authority
  • Queensland opens up more dams for stocked fishing — Fishing Charters Australia
